vBRIEFInfo.description: Scope vBRIEF (#757): Add `strategies/probe.md` adversarial-stress-test strategy and two new gh-backed skills (`deft-directive-gh-slice` for SPEC->issue slicing, `deft-directive-gh-triage` for bug-report investigation). Re-author of closed PR #440 on top of current master with proper vBRIEF coverage, stub-pattern compliance for skill discoverability, and a CHANGELOG entry. Skills use the canonical `deft-directive-*` prefix per `tests/content/test_vbrief_model.py::test_skills_dir_only_deft_directive_prefixed`.

plan.title: Add probe strategy + deft-gh-slice/triage skills (re-author of #440)

narratives.Problem: PR #440 introduced three valuable adaptations of mattpocock/skills (a `probe` adversarial-stress-test strategy and two gh-CLI-backed skills for converting SPECIFICATION.md into tracer-bullet issues and for triaging bug reports). The PR went stale (authored 2026-04-18), drifted ~3 weeks behind master, accumulated conflicts across SKILL.md, REFERENCES.md, ROADMAP.md, AGENTS.md, branch-gate workflow, and pre-commit hooks, and -- separately -- was authored without a scope vBRIEF, without a CHANGELOG entry, and without `.agents/skills/` stubs (so the new skills would not be discoverable by the agent runtime). PR #440 has been closed; this vBRIEF re-authors the three artifacts cleanly on top of current master with full gate compliance.
narratives.Overview: Three new artifacts plus minor cross-references and a CHANGELOG entry, on a fresh branch `feat/probe-and-gh-skills` off current master. Each new skill ships in two locations: canonical body at `skills/<name>/SKILL.md` and a discoverable stub at `.agents/skills/<name>/SKILL.md` per the established directory pattern (canonical body + agent-index stub). Probe is added to the strategies catalog and chaining gate. No production code paths change; this is a content-only feature for the directive framework's strategy/skill catalog.
narratives.Background: Issue #757 originally framed an interview-side probe-language tweak ('when user picks a language, prompt to consider habit vs. suitability'). PR #440 expanded the scope to a free-standing probe strategy plus two adjacent skills, all inspired by mattpocock/skills. Stub-pattern investigation (this session) confirmed that `.agents/skills/<name>/SKILL.md` files are agent-discoverable frontmatter stubs (~10 lines) that delegate to canonical content at `skills/<name>/SKILL.md`; new skills MUST ship both files to be visible to the runtime.
narratives.Constraint: MUST place each new skill in BOTH `.agents/skills/<name>/SKILL.md` (stub) and `skills/<name>/SKILL.md` (canonical) or the agent runtime will not discover the skill. MUST add CHANGELOG.md `[Unreleased]` entry per AGENTS.md pre-commit gate. MUST NOT modify production behavior or workflow files (`.github/workflows/`, `.githooks/`) -- those conflicts on the old branch were drift, not intent.
narratives.Risk: (R-1) Naming collision with future framework directions -- `deft-gh-*` is a distinct prefix from `deft-directive-*`; intentional, but worth a note. (R-2) Greptile may surface fresh findings against current standards (PR #440's review was 3 weeks old). (R-3) `strategies/interview.md` and `skills/deft-setup/SKILL.md` have moved on master; cross-reference updates must be re-applied to current content, not the old branch's content.
narratives.Outcome: Acceptance: (1) `strategies/probe.md` exists and is listed in `strategies/README.md` plus `strategies/interview.md` chaining gate options and `skills/deft-setup/SKILL.md` available strategies; (2) `skills/deft-gh-slice/SKILL.md` + `.agents/skills/deft-gh-slice/SKILL.md` stub exist and are discoverable; (3) `skills/deft-gh-triage/SKILL.md` + `.agents/skills/deft-gh-triage/SKILL.md` stub exist and are discoverable; (4) CHANGELOG.md `[Unreleased]` lists all three additions; (5) `task check` passes; (6) PR opened, checks green, squash-merged.
narratives.Test: `task check` (lint + validate + test). Manual verification that the two new skill stubs appear in the agent's skill catalog (description text matches the stub frontmatter). Greptile re-review on the fresh PR. No new unit tests required because this is content-only (no executable code added under scripts/ / src/ / cmd/); the AGENTS.md `New source files MUST include tests` rule does not apply.
narratives.Action: Step 1: promote this vBRIEF proposed/->pending/->active/ via `task scope:promote` + `task vbrief:activate`. Step 2: create branch `feat/probe-and-gh-skills` off current master. Step 3: import the three core files verbatim from `origin/feat/probe-gh-skills` (closed PR #440) and create the two missing `.agents/skills/` stubs. Step 4: re-apply minor cross-reference edits to current versions of `strategies/README.md`, `strategies/interview.md`, `skills/deft-setup/SKILL.md`. Step 5: add CHANGELOG.md entry. Step 6: run `skills/deft-directive-pre-pr/SKILL.md` quality loop. Step 7: push and open PR. Step 8: review cycle on the new PR. Step 9: squash-merge.
narratives.Urgency: Low-medium. The three artifacts are useful additions to the strategy/skill catalog but nothing downstream blocks on them. Cleaning up the stale PR #440 also closes a long-running open-PR loop.

items.title: Promote this vBRIEF: proposed/ -> pending/ (`task scope:promote`) -> active/ (`task vbrief:activate`)

narrative.Action: Two-step promotion to satisfy #810 preflight gate before any code-writing tool calls. Idempotent.
`git checkout -b feat/probe-and-gh-skills`. Local-only until ready to push.
Copy `strategies/probe.md` from `origin/feat/probe-gh-skills`. 76 lines. Preparatory strategy; adversarial decision-tree stress-test inspired by mattpocock/skills `grill-me`.

items.title: Add `skills/deft-directive-gh-slice/SKILL.md` (canonical, verbatim body from #440 with `name:` frontmatter flipped to `deft-directive-gh-slice`) + create `.agents/skills/deft-directive-gh-slice/SKILL.md` stub

narrative.Action: Canonical body = 90 lines from `origin/feat/probe-gh-skills` with `name:` frontmatter flipped to `deft-directive-gh-slice` to satisfy the deft-directive-* prefix rule. Stub = standard frontmatter (`name`, `description`) + `Read and follow: skills/deft-directive-gh-slice/SKILL.md` per the established `.agents/skills/` pattern. Description extracted from frontmatter of the canonical file.

items.title: Add `skills/deft-directive-gh-triage/SKILL.md` (canonical, verbatim body from #440 with `name:` frontmatter flipped to `deft-directive-gh-triage`) + create `.agents/skills/deft-directive-gh-triage/SKILL.md` stub

narrative.Action: Canonical body = 96 lines from `origin/feat/probe-gh-skills` with `name:` frontmatter flipped to `deft-directive-gh-triage`. Stub = standard frontmatter + delegation line as above.

items.title: Re-apply minor cross-reference edits to current master versions of `strategies/README.md`, `strategies/interview.md`, `skills/deft-setup/SKILL.md`

narrative.Action: Probe added to strategy table (preparatory type) in `strategies/README.md`, listed in chaining gate options in `strategies/interview.md`, and listed in Available Strategies in `skills/deft-setup/SKILL.md`. Verify each target file's current shape on master before patching -- do NOT blindly port old-branch diffs.
One line each for the probe strategy, deft-gh-slice skill, and deft-gh-triage skill. Group under Added. Reference issue #757 and (in retrospect) closed PR #440.

items.title: Run `skills/deft-directive-pre-pr/SKILL.md` iterative quality loop until full clean pass

narrative.Action: Read-Write-Lint-Diff cycle. `task check` must pass with zero changes.

items.title: Push branch and open PR against master

narrative.Action: PR body MUST reference this vBRIEF, issue #757, and closed PR #440 for traceability. Title: `feat: add probe strategy and deft-gh-slice/triage skills (#757)`.
Exit cleanly when no P0/P1 findings remain. P2/P3 advisory findings are non-blocking.

items.title: Squash-merge PR, verify branch deletion, fast-forward local master

narrative.Action: Squash-merge with the PR title as the commit subject. Verify any `Closes #N` references actually closed the issue (#167).

items.title: After merge, move this vBRIEF active/ -> completed/ via `task scope:complete`

narrative.Action: Status field flips to `completed`. Lifecycle close.

metadata.x-skills-pattern-note: Each new skill ships in two locations: `skills/<name>/SKILL.md` (canonical body) and `.agents/skills/<name>/SKILL.md` (agent-discoverable stub with frontmatter description). PR #440's original placement (canonical-only) would have left the new skills invisible to the agent runtime.

references.title: Issue #757: interview: probe language/tool choices through contract lens
PR #440 (closed): feat: add probe strategy and deft-gh-slice/triage skills (superseded by this vBRIEF)
